---
title: "Play Kalah"
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    include-after-body:
      text: |
        <script src="app.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<main class="app-shell">

  <section class="board-wrap" aria-label="Kalah board">
    <div class="board" id="board">
      <div class="store store-north" id="store-north" aria-label="North store"></div>
      <div class="pit-row north-row" id="north-row"></div>
      <div class="pit-row south-row" id="south-row"></div>
      <div class="store store-south" id="store-south" aria-label="South store"></div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div class="sidebar">

    <header class="game-title">
      <p class="eyebrow">KalahZero</p>
      <h1>Kalah</h1>
    </header>

    <div class="score-panel" aria-live="polite">
      <div class="player-score north-score">
        <div class="player-info">
          <span class="player-pip north-pip"></span>
          <span>North</span>
        </div>
        <strong id="score-north">0</strong>
      </div>
      <div class="status-row">
        <p id="status" class="status">South to move</p>
      </div>
      <div class="player-score south-score">
        <div class="player-info">
          <span class="player-pip south-pip"></span>
          <span>South</span>
        </div>
        <strong id="score-south">0</strong>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="controls-panel">
      <label>
        Opponent
        <select id="opponent">
          <option value="greedy" selected>Greedy</option>
          <option value="random">Random</option>
          <option value="trained">Trained agent</option>
        </select>
      </label>
      <label id="agent-url-control">
        Agent server
        <input id="agent-url" type="url" value="http://127.0.0.1:8765/move">
      </label>
      <label>
        You play as
        <select id="human-player">
          <option value="0" selected>South</option>
          <option value="1">North</option>
        </select>
      </label>
      <button id="new-game" type="button">New Game</button>
    </div>

    <div class="history-panel">
      <p class="panel-label">Position</p>
      <p id="position-summary" class="position-text">Opening position</p>
      <p class="panel-label">Move history</p>
      <ol id="history" class="history"></ol>
    </div>

  </div>
</main>
```
